zh.Warmingham, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾瓦明加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Mainwaring於1232年出生在英國爾時，他的父親William de Mainwaring I27歲，母親Agnes d'Arderne30歲。他於大約1250年與Mrs. William Mainwaring在英國英格蘭爾奧維結婚。他去世於1289年6月20日在英國爾奧維 奧福享年57歲。

zh-hans.Warmingham, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾瓦明加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Mainwaring于1232年出生在英国爾时，他的父亲William de Mainwaring I27岁，母亲Agnes d'Arderne30岁。他于大约1250年与Mrs. William Mainwaring在英国英格兰爾奧維结婚。他去世于1289年6月20日在英国爾奧維 奧福享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William Mainwaring was born in 1232, in Cheshire, England, his father, William de Mainwaring I, was 27 and his mother, Agnes d'Arderne, was 30. He married Mrs. William Mainwaring about 1250, in Over, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 20 June 1289, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Mainwaring est né en 1232, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Mainwaring I, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Agnes d'Arderne, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. William Mainwaring environ 1250, à Over, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 20 juin 1289, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Mainwaring 1232 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Mainwaring I 27 und seine Mutter Agnes d'Arderne 30. Er hat um 1250 in Over, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs. William Mainwaring geheiratet. Er starb am 20. Juni 1289 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Over Peover, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Mainwaring è nato il nel 1232 nel Cheshire, England, il suo padre, William de Mainwaring I, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Agnes d'Arderne, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. William Mainwaring circa 1250, nel Over, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 20 giugno 1289, nel Over Peover, Cheshire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Mainwaring(이)가 1232년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Mainwaring I(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes d'Arderne(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버에서 Mrs. William Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1289년 6월 20일 영국 체실르 버 p오버에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Mainwaring nasceu em 1232, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Mainwaring I, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Agnes d'Arderne, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. William Mainwaring aproximadamente 1250, em Over, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 20 de junho de 1289, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Mainwaring родился в 1232 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Mainwaring I было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes d'Arderne, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. William Mainwaring около 1250 г. в местности овир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 20 июня 1289 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Mainwaring nació en 1232, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Mainwaring I, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Agnes d'Arderne, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Mrs. William Mainwaring aproximadamente 1250, en Over, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 20 de junio de 1289, en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
